hooks.command: try{$f=([Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json).tool_input.file_path; if($f){$n=Split-Path $f -Leaf; if($n -in @('packages.lock.json','.editorconfig','Directory.Build.props')){@{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='Protected file - requires explicit user approval'}}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}}}catch{}; exit 0
